---
title: "Notebooks"
description: |
  Notebooks made with quarto + R code. I aim to use these notebooks as drafts to share with collaborators who are not familiar with R and quarto.
listing:
  - id: active
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 100px
    fields: [image, title, description]
    contents: 
      - seewandell/CON_clean_dataset.html
    sort: "false" 
    type: grid
    grid-item-border: false
---

## Active Projects

::: {#active}
:::

## Past Projects

::: {#past}
:::
